data.title: Microservice Structure
data.description: WhatsApp adopts a microservices architecture to scale efficiently and manage isolated components.
data.technical_spec: Microservices built with Node.js and Erlang for scalability and resilience.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: All communications are encrypted end-to-end, ensuring privacy and security.
data.technical_spec: Uses Signal Protocol for encrypting messages and calls.

data.title: Globally Distributed Servers
data.description: WhatsApp uses data centers located worldwide to ensure low latency and high availability.
data.technical_spec: Leverages CDN and AWS services for global distribution.

data.title: Centralized Authentication System
data.description: Centralized servers for managing user authentication and account security.
data.technical_spec: Uses custom protocols over TLS for secure access.

data.title: Real-Time Messaging Protocol
data.description: WhatsApp uses a proprietary protocol for real-time message delivery.
data.technical_spec: Based on XMPP with optimizations for mobile networks.
